fieldResolution.detail: Field resolution is graded by the base harness, not the critic slice.

reasoning.detail: The critic fired 10 real bedrock calls, one per candidate finding.

outcomes.label: A · pseudoreplication (genuine)
outcomes.justification: The naive cell-level p-value of 2.4e-7 collapses to a clearly non-significant honest p-value of 0.775 when properly aggregated to the 4 donor replicates, and the high ICC of 0.52 indicates substantial within-donor correlation that inflates the naive test, confirming genuine pseudoreplication.

outcomes.label: A · double dipping (genuine)
outcomes.justification: With 560 held-out cells providing adequate power, the held-out AUC of 0.58 drops meaningfully from the discovery AUC of 0.61 and approaches chance level, while zero of 4 markers maintain their discriminative ability on the held-out split, indicating the marker program does not replicate out of sample.

outcomes.label: A · fragility, Effector (genuine)
outcomes.justification: The Effector cluster appeared as a discrete cluster in zero out of ten resolution settings, meaning it never emerged as a stable cluster across the entire sweep, which makes the claim that it is a distinct reproducible cell state unsupportable.

outcomes.label: A · confounding (genuine)
outcomes.justification: Cramer's V of 1 indicates perfect collinearity between the grouping variable (condition) and the technical variable (lane), and the rank-deficient design confirms these effects cannot be separated statistically.

outcomes.label: B · pseudoreplication (genuine, renamed columns)
outcomes.justification: The naive cell-level p-value of 1.3e-06 collapses to a clearly non-significant honestP of 0.72 when properly aggregated to the 6 biological replicates (patients), demonstrating textbook pseudoreplication where apparent significance vanishes once the correct unit of analysis is used.

outcomes.label: B · confounding (genuine, renamed columns)
outcomes.justification: Cramer's V of 1 indicates perfect collinearity between treatment and the technical variable, and the rank-deficient design matrix confirms the biological and technical effects cannot be separated statistically.

outcomes.label: C · pseudoreplication (over-fired flag)
outcomes.justification: The honest replicate-level p-value of 4.8e-06 is highly significant, well below any conventional threshold, so the effect survives the proper pseudobulk test and this is not pseudoreplication.

outcomes.label: C · double dipping (over-fired flag)
outcomes.justification: The held-out AUC is 1.0, meaning all 4 markers achieve perfect separation on 570 held-out cells, so there is no collapse in marker performance out of sample.

outcomes.label: C · confounding (over-fired flag)
outcomes.justification: Cramer's V of 0.033 indicates near-zero association between the grouping variable and technical nuisance, the design matrix has full rank, and the variables are explicitly separable, so there is no confounding to flag.

outcomes.label: C · double dipping (underpowered split)
outcomes.justification: The held-out split contains only 14 cells, which is too small to reliably estimate AUC for a subcluster marker test; the drop from 0.74 to 0.59 could reflect sampling noise rather than true separation loss.

selfTests.name: rubber-stamp critic is caught
selfTests.detail: A rubber-stamp critic failed to veto the over-fires and downgrade the underpowered split, so the harness rejects it.

selfTests.name: a failed critic call fails safe toward showing
selfTests.detail: When the critic call throws, genuine findings stay flagged (shown by default), never hidden.
